title: Aarhus Cold Snap
lead: Aarhus is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.49. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Aarhus are characterized by a high humidity level of 78% and a wind speed of 7.2 km/h. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a significant increase in heating degree days (HDD) with a value of 13.2 GG, while cooling degree days (CDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The prolonged period of cold weather is expected to have significant impacts on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme weather event.
